infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Used to translate text and identify artworks
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Used to capture your voice for translation
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Used to convert your speech to text for translation
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Used to warn you of ZTL zones while driving
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Used to show your position on the map

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Travel Companion to access your camera to translate text and identify artworks.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Travel Companion to use your location for ZTL zone warnings.
